zh.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles於1150年出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles于1150年出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eccles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

variants.name: Exley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Exley in Southowram (Yorkshire), from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Eccles .
Americanized form of South German   Oechsle  .

variants.name: Echols
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eckles
meanings: English: variant of   Eccles  . This form is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a common nickname for bearers of any of the Scottish and Irish patronymic surnames beginning with Mac or Mc, this is now sometimes used as an independent first name, especially in the U.S.

nameMeanings.name: warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

en.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles was born in 1150. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles est né en 1150. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles wurde 1150 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles è nato il nel 1150. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Ecclesは1150年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles(은)는 1150년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles nasceu em 1150. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles родился в 1150 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Adam Mac warin De Eccles nació en 1150. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.

th.1150–: ปี 1150–ถึงแก่กรรม
th.1150–Male: ปี1150–ถึงแก่กรรม
